title: Handicap Round Recap
author: BBurkk
body:
Gentlemen,

Just wanted to thank everybody who came out for last night's handicap round, 12 guys showed up, that's a solid turnout. It was a little slow as we're still figuring things out, but we're getting there.

Quick heads-up on the new point system, make sure you're getting familiar with it.

Mike Spasiano, our CTO, built us a website that'll be up and running shortly. You'll be able to check all the league info anytime, even stare at the standings on your dual monitor all day if that's your thing. Who the hell am I to stop you?

We're still working on the site name. Don't worry Fred, we'll get it sorted soon. We're leaning toward "BBGL Bulletin Board" brought to you by the boys of base camp including Brian Burkhardt for those who love to "roll" their B's or something like that. Got any suggestions? Let us know.

No CTP or skins winners last night, so the $55 we collected rolls over to next week — $27.50 for skins, $27.50 for CTP. Remember to bring your five bucks in cash or Venmo me before the round so we don't have any confusion. Anybody can win this thing, so even if you're not feeling confident, it's worth a shot. It only takes one, as I can attest.

We're pumped for the official start of the season next week. If you know you're coming, shoot me a text and let me know ASAP — that'll help me get scorecards ready and figure out subs if we need them.

Subs are ALWAYS welcome. If everyone shows up and we're full, you can still go out, rack up individual points, play in CTP and skins, and enjoy the camaraderie. Something our dear friend Russell knows NOTHING about.

Dandelions was a hit, by the way. We had a slight scare with Sarah not tending bar but Amy calmed us all down, as she has a way of doing and assured us, it's only temporary. She'll be back forgetting to put our orders in to the kitchen then double charging us in no time. It was also sad to see "Set-up" without "Squatch" eating their patented meal. Hoping they make amends and we don't have a fallout on our hands. "Side Cart" may be hoping differently. Anybody's guess.

That's all for now. Have a good week, boys. Can't wait to get this season rolling.

Love you guys!

Your Co-Commish,

BBurkk
